steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to specify the number of merchant ships in Saudi Arabia in 2021. The relevant note is: ‘In 2021, there were a total of 392 merchant ships registered in Saudi Arabia.’ The correct choice must state that count.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In total, Saudi Arabia's merchant ships had a carrying capacity, or deadweight tonnage, of 13.7 million tons in 2021.: gives deadweight tonnage, not ship count. ✗
  • Choice B — Combined, Saudi Arabia's merchant ships had a deadweight tonnage of 13.7 million tons in 2021.: also gives tonnage, not ship count. ✗
  • Choice C — The carrying capacity of a merchant ship is also known as deadweight tonnage.: defines a term, states no count at all. ✗
  • Choice D — There were a total of 392 merchant ships—ships hired to carry cargo or passengers—registered in Saudi Arabia in 2021.: states the exact count and adds a clarifying definition of merchant ship. ✓
D is correct.
